commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: Able. He hath attempted too much.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: Let heretics give heed.… “His haughtiness and his arrogance and his pride and the loftiness of his heart I know,” says the Lord, “because his strength is not according to the loftiness of his boasts.” - "Against the Pelagians 2.29"
